name: trend-radar
description: daily trend research and content brief generator for creators. fetches from hackernews, reddit, tiktok, youtube, product hunt, and google trends, scores by niche fit, and drops 3 shootable video briefs into notion every morning. on first run it guides you through full setup.

setup.instructions: install with `npx skills add codemathics/trend-radar -g -a claude-code`, then type /trend-radar in claude code. on the first run it guides you through setup (notion, niches, voice, test run); after that it runs the daily radar.
